lighting.shadow_character: Filled with a white reflector or fill light

color.grading_style: Film look with lifted blacks and a subtle teal tone in shadows

composition.focus_point: Center part with meat and sesame seeds
composition.composition_rule: Rule of Thirds and Leading Lines

texture.detail_rendering: Realistic rendering of glossy meat, fluffy rice, and rough wooden board textures

improvement_notes: Add drama with a strong rim light and negative fill. Enhance color story with complementary colors or selective saturation. Introduce dynamic elements like hands and use a lower camera angle.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: A commercial food photography of [FOOD NAME], 45-degree angle view, close-up shot, plated in a minimalist ceramic bowl on a rustic wooden surface with a clean off-white background. Lighting is a soft and diffused side-backlight from the left, creating gentle highlights and soft shadows, with subtle fill light from the right. Shallow depth of field with an 85mm lens at f/3.5, focus sharp on the main texture of the food. Color graded with a Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic, featuring natural saturation, slightly lifted blacks, a warm and inviting white balance around 5000K, and an overall clean, modern, and appetizing mood. --style raw --ar 4:5
